app.name: goose
app.tagline: a local, extensible, open source AI agent that automates engineering tasks

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Configure how goose appears on your system
appearance.notificationsManagedByOS: Notifications are managed by your OS
appearance.menuBarIconDesc: Show goose in the menu bar
appearance.preventSleepDesc: Keep your computer awake while goose is running a task (screen can still lock)
appearance.costTrackingDesc: Show model pricing and usage costs

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Customize the look and feel of goose

language.title: Language
language.description: Select the display language for the application

helpFeedback.title: Help & feedback
helpFeedback.description: Help us improve goose by reporting issues or requesting new features

updates.title: Updates
updates.description: Check for and install updates to keep goose running at its best

macInstructions.title: To enable notifications on macOS:
macInstructions.step3: Find and select goose in the application list
macInstructions.step4: Enable notifications and adjust settings as desired

windowsInstructions.title: To enable notifications on Windows:
windowsInstructions.step3: Find and select goose in the application list
windowsInstructions.step4: Toggle notifications on and adjust settings as desired
